data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for room assignment with conflict checks, but the evidence does not demonstrate any checks or mechanisms in place to handle room conflicts. The linked use case specifies the need for conflict checks, yet there is no supporting evidence that confirms this functionality has been implemented or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of room assignment conflict checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
